subcodes.title: Words to some students, spoken on 1914-10-12
subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, that the Bahai students in Beirut are well known for the beauty
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود اینست که الحمد الله تلامذه بهائی در بیروت بحسن اخلاق بحسن اطوار
